codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for Cluster 2 GUI design-system application. The implementation replaces targeted hardcoded semantic colors with CSS variable mappings across Approvals, ApprovalDetail, and Costs-related components, removes the targeted shadow usage, and leaves Activity unchanged because it is already design-system compliant. No correctness, regression, or contract-compliance defects were found in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The gui-worker procedure currently requires running TUI tests for GUI-only design tasks, but this feature contract requires only UI tests plus agent-browser verification. The reviewed worker followed the feature contract and did not run TUI tests, while handoff metadata still marks procedure as fully followed, indicating a procedure/contract mismatch that should be reconciled.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/gui-worker/SKILL.md:56-59 requires `pnpm exec vitest run packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3`; features.json:604-607 for gui-design-expansion-cluster2 requires only UI tests + agent-browser; handoff 2026-04-03T23-12-52-432Z__gui-design-expansion-cluster2__614d1b28-dab0-4d41-a595-e9de9def3ede.json:14-22 shows only UI test + typecheck commands.

summary: Feature gui-design-expansion-cluster2 passes review. Diff-level implementation matches expected behavior and validation assertions for Approvals, ApprovalDetail, Costs, and Activity design-system compliance.
